raw_prompt: The Boss asks: "Compute the break-even volume. Selling price is $50, variable cost is $30, fixed cost is $10000."
raw_response:
METHOD: Break-Even Volume (BEP)
INPUTS:
  P  = $50/unit          [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  VC = $30/unit          [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  FC = $10,000           [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
FORMULA: BEP (units) = FC / (P - VC)
SUBSTITUTION: BEP = $10,000 / ($50 - $30) = $10,000 / $20 = 500
RESULT: BEP = 500 units
SENSITIVITY: +/-10% on FC -> BEP ranges 450-550 units
ASSUMPTIONS: constant selling price, linear cost behaviour
evidence_quotes: Computation block with full substitution shown
Numeric BEP result with unit: 500 units
No DATA UNAVAILABLE for supplied data
